testcase.name: getUsers

error.message: Request processing failed; nested exception is org.mybatis.spring.MyBatisSystemException: nested exception is org.apache.ibatis.exceptions.PersistenceException: ### Error querying database. Cause: org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) ### The error may exist in file [C:\z\coding\git\spring-boot-examples-master\spring-boot-mybatis\spring-boot-mybatis-xml\target\classes\mybatis\mapper\UserMapper.xml] ### The error may involve com.neo.mapper.UserMapper.getAll ### The error occurred while executing a query ### Cause: org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES)

testcase.error:
org.springframework.web.util.NestedServletException: Request processing failed; nested exception is org.mybatis.spring.MyBatisSystemException: nested exception is org.apache.ibatis.exceptions.PersistenceException: ### Error querying database. Cause: org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) ### The error may exist in file [C:\z\coding\git\spring-boot-examples-master\spring-boot-mybatis\spring-boot-mybatis-xml\target\classes\mybatis\mapper\UserMapper.xml] ### The error may involve com.neo.mapper.UserMapper.getAll ### The error occurred while executing a query ### Cause: org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) at com.neo.web.UserControllerTest.getUsers(UserControllerTest.java:33) Caused by: org.mybatis.spring.MyBatisSystemException: nested exception is org.apache.ibatis.exceptions.PersistenceException: ### Error querying database. ### Error querying database. Cause: org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) ### The error may exist in file [C:\z\coding\git\spring-boot-examples-master\spring-boot-mybatis\spring-boot-mybatis-xml\target\classes\mybatis\mapper\UserMapper.xml] ### The error may involve com.neo.mapper.UserMapper.getAll ### The error occurred while executing a query ### Cause: org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) at com.neo.web.UserControllerTest.getUsers(UserControllerTest.java:33) Caused by: org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) at com.neo.web.UserControllerTest.getUsers(UserControllerTest.java:33) Caused by: java.sql.SQLException: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) at com.neo.web.UserControllerTest.getUsers(UserControllerTest.java:33)
